caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a white shirt with gold suspenders, a red bow tie, and a distinctive gray wig styled in a unique, spiky manner. The man also has on black headphones and glasses, suggesting he is engaged in an audio recording session. The background is filled with framed photographs and memorabilia, indicating that the setting might be a barbershop or a similar environment. A mannequin dressed in a black vest and cap is visible in the background, adding to the ambiance of the location. The man appears to be speaking into the microphone, possibly discussing topics related to business or personal development, as suggested by the podcast's title.
